subject: [PATCH v3 16/20] fuse: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) code to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a more efficient way of handling file mappings. The conversion uses macros to generate the necessary callbacks and does not introduce any functional changes. This change affects three files: fs/fuse/dax.c, fs/fuse/file.c, and fs/fuse/virtio_fs.c.
